name: @minister/membership
description: The Semaphore Merkle-group + snapshot + membership-proof primitive behind pluggable seams: a MerkleGroupProvider (per-app eligible leaf set), an optional SnapshotStore (with a package-shipped live no-op store), and a ProofEngine with two shipped engines - semaphoreEngine over @minister/identity (vanilla Semaphore v4, dynamic LeanIMT) and rlnEngine over @minister/rln (RLN, fixed depth-20). Pins every lookup to (context, subTree, root) for authorization, excludes banned/revoked commitments from refreshed roots, and brands the v4 leaf vs the v3 RLN leaf so they cannot be confused. Consumed by FreedInk, Discreetly, and Deforum.
author: AtHeartEngineer
